Source: Bedrock Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock - Document History

## February 2026
- Feb 27: Converse API support for batch inference (consistent request format across models)
- Feb 17: Fine-tuning open-weight models with OpenAI APIs (reinforcement fine-tuning via OpenAI SDK)

## December 2025
- Dec 31: Updated model support for priority and flex service tiers
- Dec 18: Blueprint instruction optimization for Data Automation
- Dec 3: New managed IAM policies (AmazonBedrockMantleFullAccess, MantleReadOnly, MantleInferenceAccess)
- Dec 3: OpenAI-compatible API endpoints (Bedrock Mantle) — Responses API and Chat Completions API
- Dec 3: Reinforcement fine-tuning capability

## November 2025
- Nov 26: Reserved service tier for Bedrock inference
- Nov 24: Claude Opus 4.5 model support
- Nov 21: Guardrails cross-account sharing within AWS organizations
- Nov 20: Data Automation synchronous invocation
- Nov 19: OpenAI GPT-OSS models for custom model import
- Nov 19: Enhanced coding support for Guardrails Standard tier
- Nov 18: Priority and flex service tiers
- Nov 18: Region expansion (Africa, Asia Pacific, Canada West, Mexico, Middle East)

## October 2025
- Oct 31: Aurora Knowledge Base PostgreSQL guidance update
- Oct 30: Claude 3.7 Sonnet legacy status (migrate to Claude Sonnet 4.5 by April 28, 2026)
- Oct 28: Stability AI Image Services (4 new services)
- Oct 16: Model stacking for customization
- Oct 15: Claude Haiku 4.5 model support
- Oct 15: Default access to all foundation models with correct IAM permissions
- Oct 7: Updated AmazonBedrockFullAccess managed policy

## Key Highlights
- 100+ supported foundation models
- OpenAI-compatible API endpoints (Bedrock Mantle)
- Guardrails with cross-account sharing
- Multiple service tiers (on-demand, priority, flex, reserved)
- Significant regional expansion
